global.description: The ad features a vibrant blue background with a prominent sale announcement and call to action.
global.main_message: Promoting a limited-time flash sale for VantaStyle products.

elements.label: Solid blue background
elements.description: A solid blue background fills the entire canvas, providing a vibrant and engaging backdrop.

elements.label: VantaStyle logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'VantaStyle' in a modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Decorative element
elements.description: An abstract shape or design element in the center, adding visual interest without specific identification.

elements.label: Flash sale announcement
elements.description: Bold white text stating 'Flash sale live Only this weekend' prominently displayed in the center.
elements.text_content: Flash sale live Only this weekend

elements.label: Brand name
elements.description: The brand name 'VantaStyle' appears in a clean, modern font at the top of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A rounded button with the text 'Book now' in white, located at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Price tag
elements.description: The price '€9.99' displayed in a bold font at the bottom, drawing attention to the offer.

elements.label: User-generated content tag
elements.description: A small tag labeled 'UGC' positioned at the top, indicating user-generated content.
